title: Gold Holds Recent Gains as Traders Watch US Tariffs, Iran Talks
description: Gold steadied, as traders weighed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and the impact of US tariffs on global trade.
content: Gold steadied, as traders weighed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and the impact of US tariffs on global trade.
